results.name: Cuspal Sub Lord of 7th House for Marriage Timing
results.reasoning: The 7th Cuspal Sub Lord (Ketu) is in the star of Venus, which signifies houses [5, 4, 11]. This is highly favorable as it connects directly with key relationship houses (2, 7, 11), confirming marriage promise.

results.name: 10th Cuspal Sub Lord for Career and Profession Sector
results.reasoning: The 10th Cuspal Sub Lord (Rahu) is in the star of Jupiter, which signifies houses [9, 6]. Direct connection to professional houses [2, 6, 10, 11] triggers high status, stability, and career progress.

results.name: Financial Status & Wealth Promise via 2nd Cuspal Sub Lord
results.reasoning: The 2nd Cuspal Sub Lord (Rahu) resides in the star of Jupiter, signifying houses [9, 6]. Highly auspicious indicators for wealth accumulation and sound capital gains.

results.name: Health and Disease Propensity via 1st and 6th CSL
results.reasoning: The 6th Cuspal Sub Lord (Rahu) is in the star of Jupiter, signifying houses [9, 6]. Alert: Linkage with disease-prone houses (6, 8, 12) suggests keeping a healthy routine.

results.name: Dasha-Bhukti-Antara (DBA) Event Trigger Validation
results.reasoning: Current major active timeline lords are Mahadasha: Mercury and Bhukti: Saturn. These planetary nodes are ripe to trigger events in their designated houses.
